items.name: Butterfly Shirt
items.description:
More Accessories: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=DreamLabs%20Clothing&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&IncludeNotForSale

Cute Y2K Kawaii Blue Wings Butterfly White Shirt

Thanks for shopping at Dreamlabs! Join our group for updates on new clothing releases and more!

Butterflies Poem:
Chrysalis of hope, colorful wings take flight,
Flutter by the flying insect, a wondrous sight.
Plants provide nectar, metamorphosis unfolds,
Wings spread wide, a story yet untold.

Butterfly, butterflies, dancing in the breeze,
Bumblebee friends above the caterpillar trees.
Flowers bloom, a feast for all,
Moth at night, a silent call.

Fairy of the air, butterflies so bright,
A symbol of joy, a dazzling light.

Butterflies inspire, they teach us to fly,
To transform and grow, to reach for the sky.

So let us cherish these winged gems,
And protect their world, wherever life stems.
